iot.topicrule.timestreamdimension.CfnAbo: Metadata attributes of the time series that are written in each measure record.

iot.topicrule.timestreamdimension.Name.Description: The metadata dimension name. This is the name of the column in the Amazon Timestream database table record.

iot.topicrule.timestreamdimension.Value.Description: The value to write in this column of the database record.
